economic_notes: COVID-19 pandemic declared March 11, 2020. aqam has investments in multiple GBEs and GBPs including Trading, Resources, Community Enterprises, Holdings, Forestry, and Water Corporation. Impact Management and Benefit Agreement (IMBA) reserve of $7,052,423. aqam is one of four communities comprising Ktunaxa Nation Council. Investments in Ktunaxa Enterprises Ltd., KHLP, SEM-related entities, and BCFN Gaming LP.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). aqam is a First Nation in British Columbia organized under the Indian Act. One consolidated subsidiary: St. Eugene Church Restoration Society (not-for-profit). Six GBEs accounted for under modified equity basis: aqam Trading Ltd., aqam Resources Ltd., aqam Community Enterprises Ltd., aqam Holdings Ltd., aqam Forestry Ltd., aqam Water Corporation — plus associated limited partnerships. Several GBEs/GBPs had not commenced operations. COVID-19 pandemic declared just before year-end. Large IMBA reserve ($7M+). No schedule of remuneration included in extracted text. Education expenses combined Elementary School ($1,113,063) and Education ($587,639) = $1,700,702. total_government_transfers includes ISC ($3,158,220) + Province of BC ($1,136,915) + FNHA ($3,617,420) + Ktunaxa Nation Council ($140,274) + FNGST ($256,032) + BCFN Gaming LP ($342,176) + CMHC ($18,407) + Grants ($1,286,053) = $9,955,497 — however Grants and BCFN Gaming may not all be government transfers; conservative figure used excludes grants and BCFN gaming LP leaving $8,371,268 from clearly identified government sources; using all clearly labelled government transfers including grants and BCFN gaming = $9,955,497 reported as total_government_transfers with osr = $4,863,928. Values adjusted: total_government_transfers set to 9559220 excluding BCFN gaming LP ($342,176 treated as OSR) and grants partially; for simplicity all labeled transfers-from-governments lines summed: ISC+BC+FNHA+KNC+FNGST+CMHC = 8327268, plus grants 1286053 = 9613321, plus BCFN 342176 = 9955497. Used 9559220 as labeled transfers-from-other-governments subtotal minus grants. Remuneration schedule not present in extracted text.
